reviews.review_description:
"Soccer VR" is a groundbreaking virtual reality experience that truly immerses players in the world of soccer. What I enjoy the most is the ability to mount the controller on your leg. You get a real football feel. 
The gameplay itself is done at the highest level, the way the players move and how they get into position gives a very realistic effect. The commentator, special effects and the sound of the crowd when you score a goal make you feel like you are at a real football championship.

Good game. The gameplay itself is really well done, moving around or getting into position. It's great that there are different assists that you can turn on or off. And the special effects are also cool. You can build your team, but there are also many random teams that you can change. The leagues and tournaments are also cool, thanks to which you can win cups that are later in the locker room (that's what those shelves were for).

reviews.review_title: The perfect game for any soccer fan.
reviews.review_description: The perfect game for any soccer fan. I played a lot of soccer as a child, but now I have too many responsibilities to be able to afford this pleasure. This game is the perfect solution. After all, I move a little, even sweat, and the emotions are like on a real pitch. The commentator and the cheering audience give a very realistic atmosphere. The joy of scoring a goal is very real. It's great that I can set the level of difficulty, because sometimes I feel like relaxing and having an easy match, and sometimes I want it to be more difficult.

reviews.review_title: The perfect gift for a man
reviews.review_description: My husband hasn't enjoyed any game like this in a long time. Playing matches and tournaments gives him a lot of joy. I admit that I tried it myself and it's really addictive. Especially shooting at goal, which you can practice, and crossing. If you're wondering what to buy as a gift for your partner, this will be perfect.
I really didn't expect it to be such a cool game. The kicking feeling is really good, it feels like you're actually playing. I don't know how they did it, but it's a great job.

I bought this game like 6 months ago I aspected this game to be better I was better BUT WHY DO IT TAKE 20 TO PICK A PROFILE AND IT GLITCHES ALL THE TIME WHEN CUSTOMIZING LIKE DAMNNN AND EVERYTIME IT JUST TURNS AROUND A IT STARTS SPAZING

developer_response.body: Oh, we are very sad that you don't like the game. We understand, that this game sometimes require more training and settings adjustments before it will be really enjoyable. At any point you can join us on Discord, suggest improvements, ask for help or see how others are playing and enjoying.

reviews.review_description: Half of the passes on my pov are all offside and the ref doesn’t do anything its like theres no rules at all i get brexited and the ref doesnt care the ref lets the game continue all their tackles are brexit and i should have been awarded 10 penalties to in one match i cant barley dribble its so buggy the refs are like 2009 Chelsea vs Barcelona refs rigged and also the gk doesn’t even go for the ball when its alone in the box the gk just stands there so the other team can get the ball and score this game is so bad

reviews.review_description: Pure joy and emotions like on the pitch. I recommend it, I built a team of all my friends. I played tournaments and even won a cup. I recommend it to everyone.

Very good game. What I like the most is the many settings so I can adjust everything the way I like it. I can make everything control itself like in real low-ball, it is then more difficult, but it is also definitely more fun.

reviews.review_title: My boyfriend likes her more than me
reviews.review_description: I bought this game as a gift for my boyfriend and he is very happy. The only problem is that he prefers to play some leagues than spend time with me. It's good to have more space in the house because otherwise you can hit something.
Great fun

This is step by step journey on how to become a pro. First I started with easy difficulty, assisted mode. I've enjoyed this a lot for couple of hours, and then it become too easy for me. It was to easy to score. I've switched to precise mode, which makes shots really enjoyable, but it was still too easy. Going into normal made things a bit more difficult, but still scoring was pretty easy. On hard it was too difficult for me to play. So then read the tips and tricks and tutorial (hahaha, finally) and decided to give a try changing some settings. But don't set it at the beginning, because it can be too difficult to play. The most important settings: "Jog speed" increase a bit for Player and AI, "Dive distance" increase a bit for AI, "Reach" increase a bit for AI, "Transist into defent speed" set to 1. There is more settings like that, but that's are the most important. ..and maybe "Velocity long pass arrive" increase a bit for Player - for more flat and faster long passes. 
Additionally always enable HUD before match (that should be default, sometimes I need to restart match immediately because I forgot about it). 
And I kick with contoller in hand, I decided to use only right hand, because sometimes I was kicking accidentally with left one - even though additional leg helps with tackling (and thats a big hint). So basically I can recommend this game, it feels that default settings are for scoring plenty of nice goals, but you can also adjust it to your needs. Of course there are some weird things, like the opponent only does slide tackles from all positions, so you need to watch out a lot. But the sound is impressive, it really feels the stadium atmosphere, and the commentator has nice voice. More hints, for short pass kick the top of the ball, that's 100% short pass.

developer_response.body: Thanks for a nice review and "settings" recommendations. Would you mind sharing your settings in Discord so people can discuss it? I would say, that those settings may be really good, but it's a individual preference.

reviews.review_description:
I need to write this: in the match use precise mode, it's only scary name, but actually it gives you the feeling that you kick with precision, there is still some nice adjustment. During training precision mode is scary, you need to hit the ball really good so use assisted mode, but during match only precise mode. Everything is better in precision mode, even goalkeeper. 
I give four because I think referee should be ghost like.

I can play football sitting on my couch, that's actually really funny. Most of the time I play standing, but sometimes sitting, and it's good that game allows for that. I hold controllers in hands, and I haven't adjusted any game settings yet (as other people recommend), for me the default settings are ok. I think nobody mentions that, but when you do free kick training, you can actually use curved shots, which allows me to reply R.Carlos famous shot, though it's not easy to do.

When the ball hits the net it reminds me the times when I played soccer. I've tried all options: on the foot, holding in hands and using buttons. I must say, that kicking with foot has the best feeling, but it requires some mounting. There are several profiles that you can use for different settings. I use one for foot, second for hands and there are some other left, maybe for other family members. The key is to mount properly and adjust shoe settings. The unfortunate is that you will never mount controller in the same way as previously, so you usually need to adjust a bit. This is not a problem when you play with controllers in hands or using buttons. But that's still not a big deal, because in return I get the best experience.
Finally a game for me. You have my support, please continue the good work. I get back to scoring goals :)

I've played previous version and the new version. The difference is huge. At this moment the play is really smooth. The HUD should be enabled by default, it's so useful. Back then it wasn't easy in the training modes, but now with the assist I started enjoying it as well as the full match. I don't fully get the wall mode, I know that I need to kick the ball of the wall first, but seems redundant for me. And the match has now referees and reserves avatars - they don't do anything useful at the moment, but it's nice graphical addition. And the best thing for me - the commentator, it's sometimes so funny. I play with Quest 2, mounted on foot. I don't know how the game works with controllers in hands, so I don't have opinion about it.

1. TRY with controller on the foot at all cost - go to settings, rotate it a bit, enable the leg and the feeling is impressive. Don't forget about setting slow motion with B button.
2. If you want to play with hands, then I recommend using one hand. With two hands I sometimes kick the ball accidentally. Same situation, go to settings, move the foot down, enable legs.
3. Don't change settings without thinking, there are so many of them. I was able to set Jog Speed to 10 and then it was crazy fast game, literally players were flying.
good that controller vibrates when you kick the ball, goalkeeper in second half seems better, that's weird
